race.comment: EMPIRE OF ART (5) has recorded three minor placings from four starts this preparation, the latest when second as a well-fancied conveyance over 1950m at Ipswich. Long overdue and expected to go close. WATERMELON (1) has been thereabouts recently, the latest result a fifth beaten 1.75 lengths at Gold Coast Poly over 1900m. Has the pace to settle in the leading division. Goes best on the poly but tough and among the leading chances. VREDEFORT (8) turned in a handy position before finishing second last start over 1600m at Sunshine Coast Poly, beaten 1.3 lengths. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot take this out. BIG TECH (9) broke his maiden last start over 1800m at this track, scoring by 1.75 lengths. This is tougher but he cannot be underestimated. ALBANIAN BEAUTY (10) hasn't been far away and the former Victorian is suited by the longer trip now. Has claims.
